title: Rebilling
description: Rebilling metadata for this line item.

rebillable.title: Rebillable
rebillable.description: Whether this line item is eligible for rebilling.

rebill_status.title: Rebill Status
rebill_status.description: Status of the rebilling process for this line item.

linked_transaction_id.title: Linked Transaction ID
linked_transaction_id.description: The ID of the transaction this line item was rebilled to.

linked_transaction_line_id.title: Linked Transaction Line ID
linked_transaction_line_id.description: The ID of the line item in the rebilled transaction.
